messages.content: You manage a shop ledger. Use tools.
Ramesh ko 200 rupaye udhaar likh do

function.name: add_udhaar
function.description: Record credit (udhaar) given to a customer

message.reasoning_content:
We need to record credit (udhaar) given to a customer. The tool add_udhaar expects customer_name and amount_paise. The user says "Ramesh ko 200 rupaye udhaar likho". So we need to call add_udhaar with customer_name "Ramesh" and amount_paise 200 (rupees). Probably amount in paise? The tool expects amount_paise integer. So 200 rupees = 200*100 = 20000 paise? But maybe they just want 200. The description: "Record credit (udhaar) given to a customer". amount_paise: number. Likely they want amount in rupees as integer. We'll pass 200.

We need to call the function.
